title: Payment Service Memory Leak
symptoms: High memory usage, slow response times, OOM errors in payment-service logs
root_cause: Memory leak in payment-service caused by unclosed database connections in the transaction handler
fix: Increased heap size to 4GB, added connection pooling with max 20 connections, implemented circuit breaker pattern

title: Nginx 502 Bad Gateway Spike
symptoms: Mass 502 errors in nginx logs, upstream connection refused, latency spike to 8000ms
root_cause: Upstream FastAPI workers exhausted due to a slow database query blocking all threads
fix: Added query timeout of 5s, increased worker count from 4 to 16, added slow query logging

title: Kubernetes Pod CrashLoopBackOff
symptoms: Pod restarting every 30 seconds, CrashLoopBackOff status, container exit code 137
root_cause: Container memory limit set too low at 256MB, application needed 600MB at peak load
fix: Increased memory limit to 1GB, added liveness probe with initialDelaySeconds 60

title: Database Connection Pool Exhaustion
symptoms: TimeoutError acquiring connection, queue full errors, all API endpoints returning 500
root_cause: Sudden traffic spike combined with a slow query in analytics service holding connections for 45+ seconds
fix: Killed long-running analytics queries, set query timeout to 10s, increased pool size from 10 to 50

title: Python Service Unhandled Exception Loop
symptoms: Repeated Traceback errors in logs, service degraded but not down, error rate 40%
root_cause: NullPointerException in user profile handler when optional field 'address' was missing from request
fix: Added null check for optional fields, added global exception handler, improved input validation

title: Redis Cache Stampede
symptoms: Database CPU at 100%, Redis hit rate dropped to 5%, response times 10x normal
root_cause: Cache keys expired simultaneously at midnight causing all requests to hit database at once
fix: Added jitter to cache TTL values, implemented cache warming script before expiry

title: Disk Space Exhaustion on Log Server
symptoms: Services failing to write logs, disk usage at 100%, write errors across all services
root_cause: Log rotation policy misconfigured, debug logs accumulated for 60 days without cleanup
fix: Deleted old logs, set log rotation to 7 days, added disk usage alerting at 80% threshold

title: SSL Certificate Expiry Causing Auth Failures
symptoms: SSL handshake errors, authentication service returning 503, certificate expired errors
root_cause: SSL certificate for auth.internal expired, no automated renewal was configured
fix: Renewed certificate, configured auto-renewal with certbot, added 30-day expiry alert

title: API Rate Limit Causing Cascade Failure
symptoms: Third party API returning 429, internal service retrying aggressively, self-inflicted DDoS
root_cause: Retry logic had no exponential backoff, caused thundering herd against rate-limited external API
fix: Added exponential backoff with jitter, added circuit breaker, cached API responses for 60s

title: Docker Container OOM Killed
symptoms: Container suddenly stops, exit code 137 in Docker logs, no graceful shutdown
root_cause: ML model loaded entirely into memory during inference, exceeded container limit of 512MB
fix: Increased container memory to 2GB, implemented model lazy loading, added memory profiling
